job.title: L2 Network Administrator
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an L2 Network Administrator in Cavaillon, you administer and maintain the network infrastructure of our clients. You work on Cisco equipment and ensure service availability.
mission.2: Configure and maintain VLANs, spanning tree, and L2 protocols
profile.1: Associate's to Bachelor's degree in networks and telecommunications
profile.2: 2 to 5 years of experience in network administration
profile.3: Proficiency with Cisco equipment (CCNA is a plus)
profile.4: Knowledge of protocols L2 (STP, LACP, VTP)
